Shine with unstoppable energy! This dynamic head features glowing red diamond eyes and a fierce expression, perfect for anime fighters, bold avatars, or anyone with an untouchable aura. Pairs great with dark outfits, battle themes, or anything stylish and strong. Eye-catching and full of attitude, this face is built to stand out in every lobby.
